meta.title: arroyo.dev | Front-end Developer
meta.description: Portfolio of Arroyo, front-end developer specializing in React, Next.js, TypeScript, product interfaces and design systems.

hero.h1: Interfaces that look great, load fast and sell your product's value.
hero.sub: I'm Arroyo, a product-minded front-end developer. I deliver polished, responsive and consistent digital experiences — combining design, clean code and execution criteria.
hero.cockpit_ui_desc: Components designed to evolve alongside the product.
hero.cockpit_a11y_desc: Inclusive, navigable and clear layouts on any screen.
hero.cockpit_ship_desc: From prototype to deploy with polish, performance and maintainability.

valor.h2: I come in to make the interface stronger.
valor.sub: I'm not just someone who replicates screens. I connect design, engineering and business to create experiences that build trust.
strengths: I turn Figma into living, responsive interfaces ready to scale.
I build reusable components with TypeScript, Tailwind and design tokens.
I care about performance, accessibility and micro-interactions from day one.
I think like a product person: clarity, conversion, maintainability and user experience.

stack.h2: Tools to ship product, not just pretty screens.
stack.sub: I choose technology for impact: speed to build, safety to maintain, and a final experience the user can feel.
stack.card_desc: I use {name} to turn design intent into a usable, consistent experience ready to evolve.

projetos.h2: Types of delivery I'm especially strong at.

items.title: Landing pages that sell
items.description: Pages with clear narratives, strong CTAs and a structure built for conversion without sacrificing performance.

items.title: Dashboards & SaaS products
items.description: Dense, organized and fast product interfaces for daily use, with states, filters and visual hierarchy.

items.title: Actionable design systems
items.description: Components, tokens and patterns that make the team faster without stifling product creativity.

items.title: I read the product
items.copy: I understand the audience, screen objective, usage context and technical constraints before opening the editor.

items.title: I design with code
items.copy: I create layouts faithful to the design, but with responsiveness, states and components already thought out for production.

items.title: I deliver with care
items.copy: I validate build, responsiveness, basic accessibility and finishing details that separate a demo from a real product.

contato.h2: Need a front-end dev to elevate your experience?
contato.sub: I help turn ideas, layouts and flows into interfaces that radiate professionalism from the very first click.
contato.card_desc: Reach out to build a landing page, web product, dashboard or design system with personality and solid technical foundations.
